overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a covered urban plaza with distinctive yellow geometric lighting, ascending stairs, and emerging onto a rain-slicked neon-lit downtown street with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with geometric light installations

events.description: NPC in blue jacket runs quickly from left to right across the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza toward the exit stairs, passing illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: running quickly across the plaza from left to right wearing a blue jacket and cap

entered.detail: tall yellow illuminated pillars with intricate geometric lattice patterns
wide staircase with red accent lighting on the edges leading upward
large illuminated wall sign with text RASTI & REPUBLIC and FREE YOUR MIND slogan
glowing entrance with green neon lights and metal gates

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian plaza dominated by massive yellow geometric light pillars. The environment features concrete flooring and a large staircase ahead. An NPC in a blue jacket runs past from the left, and illuminated signage for RASTI & REPUBLIC becomes visible on the left wall as the camera approaches the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway exit transitioning to open city street

events.description: ascending the stairs and exiting the covered plaza into the open night city
transition from warm yellow interior lighting to cool neon city lights and street illumination

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and emerging onto the street level of the downtown district

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large red neon SOFTSYS signage visible in the distance
multi-lane wet asphalt road with moving traffic and street lights
yellow and concrete barriers separating sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: Ascending the concrete stairs while exiting the covered plaza, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the exposed night city. The SOFTSYS building becomes visible in the distance with its distinctive red neon signage, and the lighting shifts from warm yellow to the cool blues and reds of the city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown city street with neon advertisements and corporate towers

events.description: briefly slowing to observe the street before continuing forward
vehicles pass by on the wet street creating colorful light reflections on the pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk past pedestrians and street workers, navigating the downtown corridor

notable_agents.action: street worker in yellow reflective vest standing near a utility pole

entered.detail: large animated advertisements on building walls showing various products and characters
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk against the night sky
cluster of illuminated glass skyscrapers with lit windows towering overhead
covered walkway entrance with warm interior lighting and graffiti

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet downtown sidewalk surrounded by towering corporate skyscrapers and vibrant neon signage. The SOFTSYS building remains a prominent landmark ahead while digital billboards illuminate the left side. Palm trees line the street, and the reflective wet pavement mirrors the colorful city lights. Street workers and other pedestrians share the sidewalk as traffic moves along the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, geometrically lit pedestrian plaza into the rain-slicked expanse of a neon-drenched downtown district. It begins by moving through a covered area dominated by massive yellow light pillars and concrete flooring, passing an NPC in a blue jacket and illuminated RASTI & REPUBLIC signage. As the camera ascends a set of concrete stairs, the environment transitions from the warm yellow interior to the cool blue and red tones of the open city, bringing the red neon signage of the SOFTSYS building into view. The scene then expands onto a wet downtown sidewalk where towering corporate skyscrapers and digital billboards cast vibrant reflections across the pavement. Finally, the camera glides past palm trees, street workers, and flowing traffic, maintaining its trajectory toward the prominent SOFTSYS landmark under the glow of the city lights.
